https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Duchy_of_A.notes: No English or Italian Wikipedia article exists for the Ancient Arsenal of Amalfi as a standalone attraction. en/Arsenal_of_Amalfi and it/Arsenale_di_Amalfi both 404. The nearest article, Republic_of_Amalfi, redirects to Duchy_of_Amalfi with H1 mismatch.

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Amalfi_pap.notes: H1 is 'Amalfi paper' — the English article for the traditional cotton-rag paper made in Amalfi's mills, the subject of the Museo della Carta stop. No en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Museo_della_Carta article exists; Amalfi_paper is the correct English equivalent.
